name: Reynolds American, Inc.
description: Reynolds American Inc. is a prominent U.S.-based tobacco company and a subsidiary of British American Tobacco. With a history spanning over 150 years, the organization is dedicated to transitioning adult smokers away from combustible cigarettes toward innovative, science-led smokeless products. Headquartered in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, the company operates through various subsidiaries, including R. J. Reynolds Tobacco Company and American Snuff Company. Reynolds American focuses on long-term value creation, investing heavily in U.S. manufacturing, job creation, and evidence-based solutions to reduce the health impact of tobacco, while maintaining a commitment to responsible marketing and community engagement.
